name: testSelectAcquirerDropdownFunctionality
description: Verify: Selecting the 'Select acquirer' field opens a dropdown with Acquirers list.
descriptionHtml: Verify: Selecting the 'Select acquirer' field opens a dropdown with Acquirers list.

testStage.description: Verify: Selecting the 'Select acquirer' field opens a dropdown with Acquirers list.

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: Dropdown list is not empty. INFO: (9 elements)
